headline: Tonight's sky, ranked before you unpack the telescope.
subhead: Stellar combines weather, lunar phase, planet positions, and observing targets into one clear verdict.
body:
Building Stellar means starting with the question every telescope owner asks: can I actually observe tonight?

The app turns weather, Moon phase, planet positions, and target visibility into a simple Go / Maybe / Skip verdict before you leave home.

Utility first. Crypto second.

#Stellar #Astronomy #Astrophotography #Solana #BuildInPublic

headline: Why Solana belongs under the telescope, not in the way.
subhead: Embedded wallets, gasless rewards, and on-chain observation proofs keep the app useful for normal people.
body:
Why Solana for Stellar?

Because observation history, rewards, and discovery attestations should be portable, public, and cheap enough to feel invisible.

Users sign in with email. Stellar handles the wallet and gas behind the scenes.

#Stellar #Solana #DePIN #Astronomy #Web3

headline: ASTRA checks the sky before it answers.
subhead: Location-aware sky tools keep telescope advice tied to tonight, not generic chat.
body: ASTRA now checks live sky tools before it answers, so telescope advice is tied to your location and tonight's actual conditions instead of generic chat. Built for observers, not demos. stellarr.club/chat #Stellar #Astronomy #BuildInPublic #Solana

headline: Sky missions give telescope owners the next target.
subhead: Guided observation prompts turn a blank night into a concrete plan with Stars attached.
body: Sky missions turn “what should I observe tonight?” into a guided target list with rewards attached. Built for telescope owners who want a next step, not a menu. stellarr.club/missions #Stellar #Astronomy #BuildInPublic #Solana
